creator: billsf@2600.COM
text:
Cannot use 'portupgrade' though userland and kernel build fine and the
urgency is low if I am to belive your own security officer (dept.)

Fix: 

The only sure fix is regress about one week. That isn't what I'm about when
my userland and kernel have only minor problems. Maybe regress a week update
and hope I that build doesn't get too old? (please tell us)

Please use the 2600.com address and be assured its a temporary situation.

Looking to see if this is really a sw-bug anywhere else. I thought perl5.10.1
was the 'magic cure' -- nope builds and works fine. When you have over 800
ports you only care about the faulty or insecure ones. ;) That could become a
problem in other words: I'm where you all want me: "Way over my head": Help!

--billsf
How-To-Repeat: 
With portupgrade or portmaster:
Try to build or rebuild most ports -- I mean most. (most could or seem to
build manually -- 100 or so need updating -- nothing critical now.) Portmaster
only built about ten more automatically for me -- I check portmaster more
closely. :)
